executives.name: Sam Rashkin
executives.background: Mr. Rashkin is a geologist with over 15 years of experience in the mining industry. He has held various roles in exploration and development, including with major mining companies.

executives.name: Nicholas Van Dyk
executives.background: Mr. Van Dyk is a public company executive with over 20 years of experience in corporate development, finance, and investor relations in the mining sector.

executives.name: Robin Goad
executives.background: Mr. Goad is a professional geologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining and exploration industry. He has been involved in the discovery and development of several mineral deposits.

board_of_directors.name: Dale Corman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Corman has over 50 years of experience in mineral exploration and development. He was previously the Chairman and CEO of Western Silver Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Sam Rashkin
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Rashkin is a geologist with over 15 years of experience in the mining industry. He has held various roles in exploration and development, including with major mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Martino De Ciccio
board_of_directors.background: Mr. De Ciccio is a finance professional with extensive experience in the mining industry, particularly in corporate development and investor relations.

board_of_directors.name: Candace MacGibbon
board_of_directors.background: Ms. MacGibbon is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in the mining sector and capital markets.

board_of_directors.name: Kevin O'Kane
board_of_directors.background: Mr. O'Kane is a mining engineer with nearly 40 years of experience in the industry, including senior executive roles at BHP.

sources.source_description: NorthIsle Copper and Gold Inc. Official Website - Management and Directors Page
